title: MCP artifact notification parser with type and name extraction
purpose: Parses MCP responses to extract artifact creation/update notifications including type, name, and notification type.

steps.content: Validate that the response is a non-null object.
IF the response is not successful, return null.
IF the response lacks a valid ID, return null.
IF the response lacks a valid preview URL, return null.
IF the response lacks a valid message, return null.
Extract the artifact type from the preview URL.
IF the artifact type cannot be determined, return null.
Extract the notification type from the message.
IF the notification type cannot be determined, return null.
Extract the artifact name from the message.
IF the artifact name is missing or empty, return null.
Return a complete artifact notification object with all extracted values.
Convert the preview URL to lowercase for case-insensitive matching.
IF the URL contains 'diagram', return 'diagram'.
ELSE IF the URL contains 'document', return 'document'.
ELSE return null.
Convert the message to lowercase for case-insensitive matching.
IF the message contains 'created', return 'created'.
ELSE IF the message contains 'updated', return 'updated'.
ELSE return null.
Search for the first quoted string in the message.
IF a quoted string is found, return its content.
ELSE return null.
